narration: Neural networks may seem like brains, but they’re just an imitation.
visual_description: Hook visual: Neural networks may seem like brains, but they’re just an imitation.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Neural networks may seem like brains, but they’re just an imitation.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Neural networks may seem like brains, but they’re just an imitation.

narration: They borrow a metaphor, not a blueprint. Weights and layers mimic thought processes.
visual_description: Context visual: They borrow a metaphor, not a blueprint. Weights and layers mimic thought processes.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: They borrow a metaphor, not a blueprint. Weights and layers mimic thought processes.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: They borrow a metaphor, not a blueprint. Weights and layers mimic thought processes.

narration: While your brain processes information through biological neurons, AI needs training data. That’s a huge difference.
visual_description: Escalation visual: While your brain processes information through biological neurons, AI needs training data. That’s a huge difference.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: While your brain processes information through biological neurons, AI needs training data. That’s a huge difference.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: While your brain processes information through biological neurons, AI needs training data. That’s a huge difference.

narration: In neural networks, each layer builds on the last, adjusting weights to refine predictions. But it’s not sentience.
visual_description: Evidence visual: In neural networks, each layer builds on the last, adjusting weights to refine predictions. But it’s not sentience.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: In neural networks, each layer builds on the last, adjusting weights to refine predictions. But it’s not sentience.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: In neural networks, each layer builds on the last, adjusting weights to refine predictions. But it’s not sentience.

narration: Understanding this helps dismantle the AGI hype. Neural networks are powerful, but they're not conscious.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Understanding this helps dismantle the AGI hype. Neural networks are powerful, but they're not conscious.
